label: Psychic ritual -- skip abduction (player)
description: Player-castable ritual that skip-abducts a target pawn. The abducted pawn enters a coma whose duration scales with ritual quality.

comaDurationDaysFromQualityCurve.label: Coma duration days from quality curve
comaDurationDaysFromQualityCurve.description: Curve mapping ritual quality to the coma duration in days inflicted on the abducted pawn.
